name: Zen's Apps
subtitle: Custom apps for LiveContainer
description: Source for sideloaded apps built via GitHub Actions CI.

apps.name: Tidal Downloader
apps.subtitle: Download and play music from Tidal
apps.versionDescription:
What's New

Debug Logging & Error Reporting
• Actual yt-dlp error messages now shown in the snackbar (no more generic "Could not fetch info")
• New Debug Log section in Settings — captures all yt-dlp operations, cookie status, errors
• Log viewer with Copy and Share (iOS share sheet) buttons for easy export

Skip Forward/Backward
• Skip buttons (⏪ ⏩) in the now playing bar
• Configurable skip duration: 5s, 10s (default), 15s, 30s
• Skip button layout: split, left, or right of play button

Lock Screen Controls
• Play/pause and skip forward/backward now work from the lock screen and Control Center
• Skip intervals sync with in-app settings

Cookie Fix
• Fixed Netscape cookies.txt domain flag mismatch that caused yt-dlp to crash when loading cookies
• YouTube login + cookie extraction should now work correctly

Full Changelog
"171ab9b" Debug logging + error propagation
"fe1d416" Skip buttons + layout + lock screen
"14d8298" Share sheet for log export
"03b9a31" Cookie domain flag fix
"8270956" Version bump to 1.5.0
apps.localizedDescription: A Flutter iOS app that embeds CPython to run tiddl (Tidal music downloader) on-device. Features streaming playback with varispeed, library management, playlist support, and search with album art.

versions.localizedDescription:
What's New

Debug Logging & Error Reporting
• Actual yt-dlp error messages now shown in the snackbar (no more generic "Could not fetch info")
• New Debug Log section in Settings — captures all yt-dlp operations, cookie status, errors
• Log viewer with Copy and Share (iOS share sheet) buttons for easy export

Skip Forward/Backward
• Skip buttons (⏪ ⏩) in the now playing bar
• Configurable skip duration: 5s, 10s (default), 15s, 30s
• Skip button layout: split, left, or right of play button

Lock Screen Controls
• Play/pause and skip forward/backward now work from the lock screen and Control Center
• Skip intervals sync with in-app settings

Cookie Fix
• Fixed Netscape cookies.txt domain flag mismatch that caused yt-dlp to crash when loading cookies
• YouTube login + cookie extraction should now work correctly

Full Changelog
"171ab9b" Debug logging + error propagation
"fe1d416" Skip buttons + layout + lock screen
"14d8298" Share sheet for log export
"03b9a31" Cookie domain flag fix
"8270956" Version bump to 1.5.0

Changes since v1.2.1

YouTube & SoundCloud downloads
• YouTube audio download via yt-dlp (direct HTTP + HLS)
• SoundCloud audio download with HLS AAC 160kbps support
• Format selection (best/high/medium/low quality)
• Metadata tagging + cover art embedding via mutagen

YouTube Premium cookies
• Import Netscape cookies.txt for YouTube Premium 256kbps AAC
• Cookie status + management in Settings

Anti-throttle (webkit-jsi)
• Bundled yt-dlp-apple-webkit-jsi plugin for YouTube n-param decryption
• Explicit ios,mweb player client config
• n-param throttle detection with URL heuristic
• Real-time download speed display (KB/s) in progress UI
• Download stats in result JSON (bytes, time, avg speed, protocol)

Spotify/YouTube link → Tidal search
• Paste a Spotify track or YouTube link in the search bar
• Resolves title + artist via oEmbed APIs
• Preview modal with "Search on Tidal" button

Other
• Custom app icon in CI builds
• WKWebView login (replaced SFSafariViewController)
• Playlist preview fix, mounted guard
• CI trigger changed to release + workflow_dispatch only
Re-uploaded to new repo (oct-obus). Flutter iOS Tidal downloader with embedded CPython.

apps.name: Fritz!Box Tools
apps.subtitle: Device list and mesh pairing for Fritz!Box
apps.localizedDescription: WebView app with a local Dart proxy server for managing Fritz!Box routers. Features PBKDF2/MD5 authentication, device listing, and remote mesh pairing via WPS.

apps.name: CR Deck Viewer
apps.subtitle: Clash Royale deck builder and viewer
apps.versionDescription:

apps.localizedDescription: React Native iOS app for building, viewing, and saving Clash Royale decks. Features deck stats (average elixir, cycle cost), deck naming by win condition, URL import/export, and offline saved deck management.
